required_clock_fields.event_time: UTC timestamp when the market event occurred
required_clock_fields.available_at: UTC timestamp when the system could first consume the value
required_clock_fields.observed_at: UTC timestamp of this exact snapshot
required_clock_fields.revision_id: source revision identifier; immutable within a snapshot

bar_admission.completed_bar: close_time <= decision_time and is_final == true and available_at <= decision_time
bar_admission.partial_bar: observed_at <= decision_time and available_at <= decision_time; snapshot must never be replaced retroactively by final OHLC

label_admission.same_trade_features: forbidden: pnl, final MFE, final MAE, final exit reason, future stop/target outcome

revision_policy.raw_files: append-only; retain original checksum and replacement checksum
revision_policy.revised_history: new snapshot branch plus revision-impact report

minimum_validation: strict monotonic event time within source partition
